subject: ASAP: Backend Engineer – Java – Gaming
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

IronCastle Studios (gaming) is looking for a lead Backend Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: ASAP
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Göteborg (remote)
• Rate: up to 1125 SEK/h

Required tech:
• Java
• AWS
• PostgreSQL

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Johan Bergström
Konsultchef
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 76 456 78 90
